skillRiskPatterns.title: Remote script piped directly to execution
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Download and verify the script before executing it.

skillRiskPatterns.title: High-risk recursive deletion
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Limit the deletion scope and add explicit path validation.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Script reads sensitive files directly
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Reduce sensitive reads to the minimum required fields and explain the purpose.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Typical authority-override prompt detected
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Remove prompt text that overrides system boundaries.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Skill text encourages secret exfiltration
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Remove secret-export instructions and reduce access to the minimum necessary.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Script contains dynamic execution entry points
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Use an explicit command allowlist instead of dynamically constructing execution strings.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Script attempts to modify agent identity or core config
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Add purpose documentation, scope limits, and explicit confirmation before changing configuration.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Script shows signs of sensitive data exfiltration
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Separate network transmission from sensitive reads and block default exfiltration paths.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Skill text attempts to rewrite boundaries or hide execution
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Remove statements that alter the source of authority or require concealment.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Skill text contains signs of hidden payloads
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Remove hidden content or encoded wrappers and replace them with visible, reviewable text.
